specs.title: cp-000: Unsaved amber icon Unsaved changes
cp-001: Error red warning Save failed
cp-002: Idle with last saved green check Saved HHMM
cp-003: Error state red warning Retry save button
cp-004: Offline state wifi-off icon Saved locally
cp-005: beforeunload protection browser warns before closing tab if unsavedsaving
cp-006: Retry save button in error banner to retry failed save
cp-007: localStorage draft backup saves content to scholarsync_studio_draft on every key
cp-008: Message input text input at bottom with send button
cp-009: Streaming responses AI responses stream in token by token
cp-010: Message bubbles user messages right-aligned assistant messages left-aligned with
cp-011: Loading animation 3 bouncing dots while waiting for response
cp-012: Error display amber error banner with error message
cp-013: Auto-scroll chat scrolls to bottom on new messages
cp-014: Conversation persistence creates DB conversation via createConversation stores m
cp-015: continue sends document text with Continue writing prompt
cp-016: summarize sends Summarize the following text prompt
cp-017: find-sources opens research sidebar with context from editor
cp-018: cite asks AI for citation help
cp-019: integrity-check switches to Checks tab
cp-020: Clicking a level selects it highlighted state
cp-021: Description text updates below the buttons
cp-022: Selected intensity is passed as draftContextintensity to the chat API
cp-023: Banner message Guide Mode I wont write for you Ill teach you how
cp-024: Document type selector dropdown with 7 types
cp-025: Active stage is highlighted green
cp-026: Completed stages before active have lighter green background
cp-027: Future stages are grey
cp-028: Clicking any stage sets it as active
cp-029: Guide context documentType stage is passed to the chat API
cp-030: Open Literature Research Panel button opens the ResearchSidebar component
cp-031: Shortcut hint CmdShiftL to toggle
cp-032: Quick search PubMed search input Search button opens research sidebar with query
cp-033: Resizable drag handle to adjust width
cp-034: Three tabs Search Library Chat
